mapper.select: SELECT w.id, w.name, w.url, w.description, w.logo_url AS logoUrl, w.click_count AS clickCount, w.good_count AS goodCount, w.collection_count AS collectionCount FROM osh_practical_website w WHERE w.status = 1 AND (w.delete_flag = 0 OR w.delete_flag IS NULL) ORDER BY (0.50 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(w.click_count, 0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.click_count, 0))) FROM osh_practical_website x WHERE x.status = 1 AND (x.delete_flag = 0 OR x.delete_flag IS NULL)), 0), 0) + 0.30 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(w.good_count, 0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.good_count, 0))) FROM osh_practical_website x WHERE x.status = 1 AND (x.delete_flag = 0 OR x.delete_flag IS NULL)), 0), 0) + 0.20 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(w.collection_count, 0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.collection_count, 0))) FROM osh_practical_website x WHERE x.status = 1 AND (x.delete_flag = 0 OR x.delete_flag IS NULL)), 0), 0)) DESC, w.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
